title: Oden’s Past Begins to Define Wano’s Tragedy
description: On pages 2–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Oden, Unknown person #2, Orochi, Wano Citizens, Unknown person #3 as The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
scene: The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: WHAT!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: After being exiled from the Capital...

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: Are you really leaving, sir oden...?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We will be free of your trouble, but it will be lonely without you!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I heard that there was a beast living in Kuri...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: A monster by the name of Ashura Douji!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuri is a cancer upon Wano... even Lord Sukiyaki does not touch the place...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuri has become a haven for fleeing criminals. As soon as one crosses into Kuri, the laws of the shoppingmate are meaningless.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Although, if they are not strong enough to survive in Kuri, then they are only delaying their death sentence.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Kuri is so lawless, it might as well not be part of this country...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: How interest- ing!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I think I will take my own tour around the country!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the room he stayed in!! Just look at this place!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: How could he make such a mess!!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: We should demand compensation!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Well... I would rather just pretend a NATURAL DISASTER passed through...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lord Yasuie, you are too soft on Oden!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: The money is gone!?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes, it was locked in the safe, but...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Um... I hate to be a snitch, but...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: I saw what happened.

dialogue.speaker: Oden
dialogue.text: It was Lord Oden...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He... stuffed all the money into a bag!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I knew it!!! He repaid our hospitality by rubbing us!! Unforgivable!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If often was responsible, he would have done it in a more spectacular manner.

dialogue.speaker: Orochi
dialogue.text: Are you certain, orochi?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: FLINCH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: Hee Hee... yes, please forgive me...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I was just too scared to stop him...

dialogue.speaker: Wano Citizens
dialogue.text: After leaving hakumai...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oden and his followers caused many incidents on their way to Kuri.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How long are you two going to follow me!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: FOREVER!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: We adore you!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: J. He looks & disgusted!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What are you two doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: As your servants, we must stand guard!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Come inside already, you dolts!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: What are you doing!?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I have decided to keep a log.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Apparently, sailors from the outside world do the same thing during their voyages.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And so, from then on, their exploits were recorded in Oden's logbook...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: “They danced on the streets to get by, but the locals treated them scornfully.”

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "I learned that they were raised in a dancing school...

dialogue.speaker: Kiku
dialogue.text: Kikunojo

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: son of the former head of the Hanayamact School

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But their family was torn apart after their father was arrested and convicted.”

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "They scarfed down the open we made with tears streaming down their faces."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Eat up, you little brats!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It did not matter whether his victims were dead or alive."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "He turned out to be a weirdo who used the hair to make brushes, so he could sell them to make a living."

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "He came for my hair, so I beat him up. He has been following me ever since."

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: Uwaaaah, I yield!! I yield!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: I thought you were a corpse!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: "It seems that he was persecuted in the past, but you reap what you sow."

summary: This section advances the Wano - Oden and the Old Era storyline with 55 dialogue beats. The story turns to Oden’s past, showing how his life, Whitebeard, Roger, and Orochi shaped Wano’s tragedy.
